description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- fix(openai): add omitempty to chatFunction description/parameters by @eghrhegpe in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5020
- Consolidate Dependabot dependency updates / 合并 Dependabot 依赖升级 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5024
- Fix path containment for image file references / 修复图片文件引用路径边界 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5023
- Fix transcript bottom pinning / 修复对话滚动到底部定位 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5029
- ci(crash): auto-deploy crash worker on merge to main-v2 by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5036
- Fix transcript reveal signal and jump label / 修复正文 reveal 信号与跳底部文案 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5034
- Improve crash stats navigation / 改进崩溃统计导航 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5041
- Fix session trash sidecars / 修复会话回收站旁路文件 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5042
- Default crash stats to 30d / 默认崩溃统计为 30 天 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5044
- style(creation): 精简工具卡片错误框与代码块滚动条 by @Li-Charles-One in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5065
- 修复 ACP 配置切换取消后台任务 by @lifu963 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5069
- Support remote MCP headers in desktop / 桌面端支持远程 MCP 请求头 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5073
- Consolidate desktop rewind and plan prompt recovery / 整合桌面回溯与计划确认恢复 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5072
- perf: 优化对话删除流程 — 前端本地移除 + 锁外写磁盘 by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4981
- fix(desktop): surface CLI sessions in sidebar by @paradoxSCH in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4983
- Integrate ask user-decision fixes / 整合用户选择 ask 修复 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5082
- feat: incremental project config writes (surgical section replacement) by @jbts6 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5000
- fix(desktop): dedupe skill roots in settings by @Ninot1Quyi in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5077
- Fix short choice replies in dual-model context / 修复双模型短选项回复上下文 by @GTC2080 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5076
- Fix post-merge bot review findings / 修复合并后 bot review 问题 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5084
- Fix interrupted stream recovery / 修复长任务断流恢复 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5106
- Use global .env for provider credentials / 使用全局 .env 管理 provider 密钥 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5110
- refactor(control): extract memoryManager from Controller by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5113
- refactor(control): extract checkpointManager and rename cpRoot by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5116
- Fix provider credential follow-ups / 修复 provider 凭据后续问题 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5117
- Make desktop session switching non-blocking / 桌面会话切换改为非阻塞 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5114
- refactor(control): extract mcpManager from Controller by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5123
- refactor(control): extract skillSet from Controller by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5127
- Fix single-surface tab persistence / 修复单界面布局隐藏会话持久化 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5129
- Fix command palette escape close button / 修复命令面板 Esc 关闭按钮 by @GTC2080 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5126
- refactor(cli): split the paste/image input layer out of chat_tui.go by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5130
- Harden single-surface tab pruning / 加固单界面会话剪枝 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5133
- 统一事件 wire 契约 by @lifu963 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5101
- feat(bot): add shared connection-lifecycle primitives (connloop) by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5136
- refactor(bot): wire qq and weixin onto the connloop primitives by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5137
- refactor(bot): wire feishu onto the connloop primitives by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5139
- fix(bot): close the getOrCreateSession check-create race by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5140
- Preserve tab plugin context after boot / 保留标签页插件上下文 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5141
New Contributors
- @jbts6 made their first contribution in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5000
- @Ninot1Quyi made their first contribution in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5077
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.11.0...desktop-v1.11.1
